title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Canara Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Canara Bank Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Canara Bank Capital India family as a Financial Analyst in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!
